title: Buy a Company in Vietnam
metaDescription: Buy a ready-made shelf company in Vietnam and start doing business in as little as one week.

hero.title: Buy a Company in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: Buying a company is the fastest way to own a business in Vietnam. Start operating in as little as one week and tap into Vietnam's exciting investment opportunities.

sections.heading: The fast track to owning a business
body: A shelf company — also called an aged or ready-made company — is a pre-established entity with zero business activity and no prior transactions. Buying one lets you bypass the lengthy traditional formation process and commence operations rapidly.
InCorp Vietnam guides you through selection, valuation and due diligence so you acquire a clean, compliant company with full confidence.

items.title: Research & selection
items.desc: Identify suitable industries and evaluate market demand against your key business criteria.

items.title: Company valuation
items.desc: Assess projected earnings, asset value and comparable market pricing for negotiation.

items.title: Due diligence & documentation
items.desc: Conduct financial reviews, legal compliance checks and risk audits.

items.title: Transaction completion
items.desc: Finalize all legal and financial details with third-party transfer management.

sections.heading: Benefits of buying with us
items: Work with professional bilingual experts for clear communication
Complete cost and time transparency with no surprise fees
Direct and virtual consultations to suit your schedule
Tailored guidance aligned with your business objectives

items.q: Can foreigners establish companies in Vietnam?
items.a: Yes. Foreign investors may establish foreign-owned entities, with LLCs remaining most common due to streamlined procedures.
While no legal minimum exists, USD 25,000-30,000 represents standard practice for operational stability.
Yes, across most sectors except restricted activities such as narcotics, hazardous materials, endangered species trade and human trafficking.

items.q: How quickly can shelf company operations begin?
items.a: Management control can transfer within a few working days, enabling near-immediate business commencement.

sections.title: Own a Vietnamese company in days
sections.subtitle: Skip the wait — acquire a ready-made company and start trading fast.
